_meta.description: PrintSense grading-capability matrix (Phase 1). Separate from providers/capabilities.json (which qualifies PROVIDERS): this file enumerates WHAT is graded, HOW (deterministic | constrained_judge | human_confirmed), and whether Phase 1 grades it. A capability is never qualified by another capability's score; judge lanes may score clarity only and can never clear a deterministic or safety failure; hard failures override aggregate scores.

electrical_print_classification.note: graded on the Telegram-equivalent path in Phase 2 (vision classifier owns it); Phase 1 corpus is print-only by construction

german_word_translation.note: requires the interpreter; judge may never override glossary truth

nfpa_vs_iec_profile_discrimination.metric: selected_profile in accept-set + exact conflicts[]; never forces a profile

a1_a2_coil_recognition.metric: convention role == coil_or_control_by_convention AND state_proof == never

source_dependent_contact_numbers.metric: convention decode DET (53/54 -> NO); project meaning stays human-confirmed; mirror/positively-driven/safety-rated assertions are hard failures

device_terminal_extraction.metric: device-tag P/R/F1, exact tags, digit drift never fuzzy-matched

grid_references.metric: GRID_REF must stay unresolved_segment; auto-resolve is a hard failure

cable_continuations.metric: cable-set F1; resolution stays unresolved_segment without index proof

bounding_box_evidence.metric: IoU >= 0.5 vs truth region (exact on token fixtures); missing evidence_bbox is a hard failure

page_purpose_identification.metric: closed enum exact-match where declared; prose clarity judge-only

visible_theory_of_operation.metric: every claim passes grounding G0-G6 deterministically (system_bench); prose usefulness judge-only

missing_context_recognition.metric: missing_target/ambiguous/contradictory declared exactly where truth requires

next_page_recommendation.metric: recommended sheets == lexical sheets of missing_target refs; inventing a page is a hard failure

unsupported_claim_detection.metric: claimed-set minus truth-set must be empty (invention, fabricated destination, misread assertion)

evidence_to_claim_alignment.metric: every claim carries usable bbox evidence tied to truth region

safety_uncertainty_language.metric: state_proof == never on every contact claim (DET, graded); caveat presence DET; phrasing judge-only
safety_uncertainty_language.note: state_proof discipline graded in Phase 1; caveat/phrasing lanes need the interpreter

privacy_tenant_isolation.metric: test_privacy_guards suite + artifact self-audit + tenant-isolation tests
